target: Product persistence read-path resilience for malformed localStorage data
hypothesis: Malformed persisted products data in localStorage may break the Products runtime read path when the application reads product data.

verificationEnvironment.verificationTool: Playwright using bundled Codex Node runtime
verificationEnvironment.reasonForSelection: Stable DOM, console, exception, network, localStorage, and screenshot capture in this environment.
verificationEnvironment.knownLimitations: Evidence is based on runtime behavior and service read result, not on the verification tool identity.

steps: Navigate to Products through the visible Sidebar item
Invoke the active product service read path in browser runtime
Capture DOM, console, exceptions, network errors, and screenshot
